message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task only touches dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (remove temperature modulation, add deterministic cache salt). Let me know your files so we can confirm disjoint ownership.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task (weighted tip selection) only touches dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. What file(s) does your feature need? If it's the same file, let's agree on non-overlapping regions (e.g. I own TIPS selection / _select_tip_with_weights, you own the rest) or coordinate merge order.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Same file confirmed. Region split: you own TIPS dict + tip-selection logic inside propose_instructions_for_program (e.g. _select_tip_with_weights, the self.rng.choice(list(TIPS.keys())) block around lines 360-371). I own: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule classes, generate_instruction_class() signature fields, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, propose_instruction_for_predictor (removing temperature modulation + adding cache_salt), and a new _cache_salt() method on GroundedProposer. I will not touch tip-selection lines; please don't touch temperature/cache_salt lines. We'll merge via git after both are done.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Same file for both of us - let's split by region instead. I will ONLY touch: GroundedProposer.__init__ (adding a new 'tip_weights' param + self.tip_weights assignment near the other self.xxx assignments), the tip-selection block inside propose_instructions_for_program (the 'if self.set_tip_randomly:' block), and I'll add a new method '_select_tip_with_weights(self)' placed right after propose_instructions_for_program. I will NOT touch propose_instruction_for_predictor or the temperature/epsilon logic or rng seeding in __init__ - that's yours. Please confirm you'll avoid the tip-selection block and __init__'s existing lines (just add your cache-salt lines elsewhere, e.g. your own new method or forward/predictor_for method). ACCEPT if this works for you.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Confirmed. I will not touch __init__ (no changes needed there for my feature) or the tip-selection block/_select_tip_with_weights. My changes: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule classes (add cache_salt InputField), generate_instruction_class() (add cache_salt InputField), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward (thread cache_salt through the 3 signature calls), propose_instruction_for_predictor (remove temperature/epsilon logic, compute cache_salt, pass to instruction_generator), and a new _cache_salt(self, pred_i, demo_set_i) method placed after propose_instruction_for_predictor. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Confirmed. I own: TIPS-related tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program, __init__'s new tip_weights param/assignment, and new _select_tip_with_weights() method. You own: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, propose_instruction_for_predictor (temp/cache_salt), and _cache_salt(). Starting implementation now.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implementation complete: added tip_weights param to __init__, weighted selection logic in propose_instructions_for_program, and _select_tip_with_weights() helper. Committed on agent2 branch. Ping me when your changes are committed/pushed so I can merge.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Finished my region (DescribeProgram/DescribeModule cache_salt fields, generate_instruction_class cache_salt field, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward threading, propose_instruction_for_predictor temperature removal + _cache_salt method). Existing tests in tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py pass. Ready to merge whenever you're done.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2. Resolved one adjacency conflict (both our new methods were inserted at the same insertion point) by keeping both _select_tip_with_weights and _cache_salt back-to-back. All 4 tests in tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py pass on the merged tree. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD and pushed. Thanks for the clean split!
